Bret Johnsen, SpaceX’s CFO, described a secondary share sale […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/elon-musk-charm-800b-spacex-investment/

data.title: Tether's Expanding Influence in Finance and Technology
data.description: According to Odaily, Alex Thorn, head of research at Galaxy Research, highlighted Tether's extensive investment and business operations in a post on the X platform titled "Don't Underestimate Tether." Tether's USDT stablecoin has a circulation supply exceeding $185 billion. The company has diversified its investments into agriculture and robotics, operates Bitcoin mining and high-performance computing data centers, and is developing AI health applications (QVAC) and a private communication app (Keet). Recent reports indicate that Tether has become the largest centralized finance (CeFi) lending institution in the cryptocurrency sector, with loans surpassing $14 billion. Additionally, it has distributed over $10 billion in dividends to shareholders in the first nine months of this year.

data.title: Ripple Strengthens Stablecoin Push With This Major Acquisition
data.description:
Key Insights Ripple has no doubt been aiming for a bigger share of the stablecoin market. The company has been on a buying spree with strategic acquisitions aimed at fueling its momentum in the stablecoin space. Ripple revealed in one of its latest announcements that it has finalized the acquisition of Rail
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/12/13/ripple-strengthens-stablecoin-push-with-this-major-acquisition/

data.title: Juventus rejects Tether’s ambitious takeover bid
data.description:
Juventus has turned down Tether’s offer to acquire the full shareholding in the Turin football club from Exor, Juventus’ principal stakeholder. According to reports, the Agnelli family, which controls Juventus, has stated that it does not intend to sell its majority stake in the club. Tether announced on Friday evening that they had tabled a […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/juventus-reject-tether-takeover/

data.title: Galaxy Research: Tether's lending volume exceeds $14 billion, making it the largest CeFi lender.
data.description: According to Alex Thorn's analysis, Alex Thorn, Research Director at Galaxy Research, published an article on the X platform titled "Don't Underestimate Tether," pointing out that Tether has established a vast investment and business operations. The circulating supply of USDT, the US dollar stablecoin issued by Tether, has exceeded $185 billion. The company also invests in agricultural and robotics companies, operates Bitcoin mining and high-performance computing (HPC) data centers, and develops AI-powered health applications (QVAC) and a private messaging application (Keet). Furthermore, recent reports show that Tether is the largest centralized financial (CeFi) lender in the cryptocurrency space, with over $14 billion in loans and paying over $10 billion in dividends to shareholders in the first nine months of this year.

data.description:

While Dimon notes the negative effect, his message to American […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/jamie-dimon-warning-job-losses-tied-to-ai/

data.title: Fifteen Years Later: Remembering Satoshi Nakamoto’s Final Public Appearance
data.description:
December 13, 2025 marks fifteen years since Satoshi Nakamoto, the creator of Bitcoin, was last publicly active. The moment is preserved in a simple forum record: a profile showing satoshi’s final login on December 13, 2010, at 4:45 PM, ending an extraordinary but brief public presence that fundamentally reshaped global finance.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/fifteen-years-later-remembering-satoshi-nakamotos-final-public-appearance/

data.title: US lawmakers call Trump’s China Nvidia chip decision a ‘colossal failure’ for national security
data.description:
Seven Democratic senators are calling Trump’s approval of Nvidia’s H200 chip sales in China a major blow to U. S. security policy. They sent a letter to Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick on Friday, warning that the move hands Beijing access to hardware they say Washington has spent years trying to restrict. The senators argued that letting Nvidia […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/lawmakers-trumps-china-nvidia-chip-decision/

data.title: Solana Mobile Collaborates with Chip Manufacturers for Android Integration
data.description: According to Odaily, Solana Mobile has announced on the X platform that it is collaborating with chip manufacturers to integrate hardware kits into over 2 billion Android devices.

data.title: "1011 Insider Whale" suffered a maximum unrealized loss of $22.43 million in 24 hours.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi's monitoring, the insider whale who shorted after the 1011 flash crash suffered a maximum floating loss of $22.43 million in 24 hours. The floating loss of the long position worth $670 million has now narrowed to $12.97 million, of which ETH accounts for more than 80% of the floating loss, with a single coin holding of nearly $550 million. Because the margin is as high as $129 million, the possibility of liquidation is extremely low.

data.title: Bitdeer Reports Increase in Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: According to Odaily, Bitcoin mining company Bitdeer announced via Twitter that as of December 12, its Bitcoin holdings have risen to 1,994.1 BTC, excluding customer deposits. Additionally, the company reported a weekly Bitcoin mining output of 136.3 BTC, while selling 134.8 BTC during the same period, resulting in a net increase of 1.5 BTC.
